## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / tech debt
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles and `./mvnw verify` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Added a Flyway migration if the schema changed (never edited an existing one)
- [ ] Updated documentation (README / Javadoc) where relevant
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data committed
